name: 001_single_source_dest_rename.sh
exercises: SOURCE DEST form: documented to rename SOURCE to DEST
expected: Destination path exists as the renamed file with the original contents.

name: 002_single_source_existing_directory.sh
exercises: SOURCE DEST ambiguity: existing DEST directory is the documented move-to-DIRECTORY form
expected: The single source is moved inside the existing destination directory.

name: 003_no_target_directory_rejects_dir_dest.sh
stderr: mv: cannot move '/tmp/tmp.XbX0TNCZRW/item' to '/tmp/tmp.XbX0TNCZRW/target': Is a directory (os error 21)
exercises: -T/--no-target-directory: documented to treat DEST as a normal file, not as a target directory
expected: Moving a regular file to an existing directory path under -T fails nonzero.

name: 004_multi_source_directory_form.sh
exercises: SOURCE... DIRECTORY synopsis: multiple sources are moved into the directory
expected: Both source files appear as entries in the target directory.

name: 005_multi_source_requires_directory.sh
stderr: mv: target '/tmp/tmp.2m6f6c7x8u/notdir' is not a directory
exercises: SOURCE... DIRECTORY synopsis: the final operand must be a directory for multiple sources
expected: Using multiple sources with a non-directory final operand exits nonzero.

name: 006_target_directory_option_form.sh
exercises: -t/--target-directory=DIRECTORY: documented to move all SOURCE arguments into DIRECTORY
expected: Both source files are moved into the directory named by -t.

name: 007_target_directory_must_be_directory.sh
stderr: mv: target directory '/tmp/tmp.AJ143315c2/notdir' is not a directory
exercises: -t/--target-directory=DIRECTORY: argument is documented as a directory
expected: Using -t with a non-directory target exits nonzero.

name: 008_unstripped_trailing_slash_on_file_fails.sh
stderr: mv: cannot stat '/tmp/tmp.FChjQVdthW/file/': No such file or directory
exercises: Trailing SOURCE slash without --strip-trailing-slashes: adjacent category to documented stripping option
expected: A regular-file SOURCE operand with an unstripped trailing slash fails nonzero.

name: 009_strip_trailing_slash_single_file.sh
exercises: --strip-trailing-slashes: documented to remove trailing slashes from each SOURCE argument
expected: The trailing slash is stripped from the file SOURCE and the rename succeeds.

name: 010_strip_trailing_slashes_each_source.sh
exercises: --strip-trailing-slashes with multiple SOURCE operands: documented to strip each SOURCE argument
expected: Both regular-file sources with trailing slashes are moved into the target directory.

name: 011_final_no_clobber_wins_over_force.sh
exercises: Final option among -i, -f, -n takes effect: -f followed by -n means no-clobber
expected: The existing destination file is not overwritten.

name: 012_final_force_wins_over_no_clobber.sh
exercises: Final option among -i, -f, -n takes effect: -n followed by -f means force overwrite
expected: The existing destination file is overwritten by the source.

name: 013_interactive_reads_stdin_no.sh
stderr: interactive no response did not preserve destination
exercises: -i/--interactive prompts before overwrite and final -i overrides earlier -f; stdin response 'n' skips
expected: With -i and a negative stdin response, the existing destination remains unchanged.

name: 014_update_older_default_skips_newer_dest.sh
exercises: --update with absent UPDATE argument: documented default is older, replacing only older destinations
expected: A newer destination is not replaced when --update is specified without an argument.

name: 015_no_update_defaults_to_all.sh
exercises: No --update option: documented default operation is all, replacing all existing destination files
expected: The existing destination is replaced even though it is newer than the source.

name: 016_update_none_skips_without_failure.sh
exercises: --update=none: documented like --no-clobber, skipped files do not induce failure
expected: The existing destination is left unchanged and the command succeeds.

name: 017_update_none_fail_reports_failure.sh
exercises: --update=none-fail: documented to diagnose skipped files and induce a failure
expected: Skipping an existing destination under none-fail exits nonzero.

name: 018_invalid_update_value_fails.sh
exercises: --update=UPDATE documented value set is {all,none,none-fail,older}; outside value should be rejected
expected: An UPDATE value outside the documented set exits nonzero.

name: 019_backup_simple_suffix_tilde.sh
exercises: --backup[=CONTROL] with simple control and default backup suffix '~'
expected: Overwriting an existing destination creates a simple backup named with a trailing tilde.

name: 020_backup_numbered_name.sh
exercises: --backup=numbered: documented to make numbered backups
expected: The first numbered backup is created using the numbered backup naming form.

name: 021_backup_none_makes_no_backup.sh
exercises: --backup control value none/off: documented to never make backups even if --backup is given
expected: No tilde-style backup file is created when backup control is none.

name: 022_exchange_swaps_two_files.sh
exercises: --exchange: documented to exchange source and destination
expected: After exchange, the former destination contents are at the source path.
